-------鞠婧祎","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5nWCU/8T+UXsG6qNB4SGVKe6/E+tHGpOeoy/3/RDRsN","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/97b34134d2f649039c2111322397621c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776703874\u0026x-signature=whYQP0ZWqK3z9TrriGL4v5H8mpA%3D","user_id":"1653272707874339","user_name":"遇祎✧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1653272707874339","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6888641437156510734","book_info":{"abstract":"穿剧+复仇+甜宠+女强男强，一个是傻白不甜却富可敌国的亡国郡主，另一个是少年老成却穷困潦倒的小中医，一个是被两任丈夫欺骗，身首异处，另一个是看遍全网宫斗剧，却为毕业论文发愁，当两人合二为一，结果却是1+1不等于2，看她穿进电视剧中，吊打将她母亲害死的渣男爹爹，诱拐叱咤风云的一代江湖魔头当男闺蜜，狂拽神秘的奸臣为她隐退当老公，忠犬将军对她言听计从，且看她如何手拿剧本逆天开挂，夺回属于她的故国与财富。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/30326052f6182429493fec13b3982fa3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"厚朴已开","author_id":"","book_id":"6888641437156510734","book_name":"穿成祸国奸臣的宠妃","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":246,\"name\":\"宫斗宅斗\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246\u0026name=宫斗宅斗\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":5,\"name\":\"古代言情\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5\u0026name=古代言情\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":30,\"name\":\"宠妻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30\u0026name=宠妻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}
